subject: WM-0092 review: changes_requested
body: High: Desktop Electron product surface lacks automated pointer selection and keyboard pan/zoom evidence required by WM-0092 Web/Windows input baseline. Web e2e covers canvas pointer plus Equal/ArrowLeft, but desktop-shell e2e only checks launch, bilingual text, non-color cues, media/animation absence and overflow. Add Electron dev/packaged surface input assertions before verification. Other required checks passed.
